scripts.check: npm run test:core-ops && npm run test:saas-integrations && npm run test:ops && npm run test:final
scripts.release:check: npm run check:env && npm run type-check && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run test:ops && npm run go-live:check
scripts.go-live:check: npm run check:env && npm run type-check && npm run build && npm run test:ops && node scripts/go-live-check.mjs
scripts.growth:check: npm run check:env && npm run type-check && npm run build && npm run p8:check
scripts.test:unit: node tests/unit/core-policy.test.mjs && node tests/unit/availability-lock-guards.test.mjs && node tests/unit/reliability-sweep-policy.test.mjs && node tests/unit/reliability-metrics.test.mjs && node tests/unit/ai-assistant.test.mjs && node tests/unit/go-live-hardening-regressions.test.mjs
scripts.test:ops: npm run check:uptime && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.final:verify: npm run check && npm run reality:check && npm run build
scripts.verify:deploy: npm run final:verify && npm run deploy:check
scripts.check:strict: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run test:core-ops && npm run test:saas-integrations && npm run test:ops && npm run test:final
